sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n663" key="a)glao/foitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγλαό-φοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n663.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who 'walks in beauty'</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:403" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">403</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
